character_dossiers.name: Squire Trelawney
character_dossiers.biography: A gentleman who asked the narrator to write the story and is part of a group that hired the captain.

character_dossiers.name: Dr. Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: A doctor who visits the inn to see the innkeeper and takes dinner.

character_dossiers.name: the captain
character_dossiers.biography: A sea-dog who stays at the inn, has a sea-chest, and is feared by the narrator for his stories and presence.
